Earn Links With Every Single Content Marketing Campaign

We consistently secure content coverage from top-tier publishers including Lifehacker, The Sun, FOX News, Huffington Post, Business Insider and Mail Online.

Learn More
Our Guarantee

We guarantee to meet or exceed the agreed number of high authority features. If we don't, you will receive a free campaign until we do. Pricing is based on the results we achieve.

how it works

We have a clear process that works

Ideation Stage

Join us for a 40-minute on-boarding call so we can get to know more about your business goals. Then, our team will jump straight into idea generation. We draw on our experience from over 1,200 successful campaigns and use various tools to gather data from across the web. Read more about our ideation process here.

WHAT YOU GET
  • 3 content ideas with explanations about why they're relevant and how they will work for you.

We include a visual element with every idea. Whether it's a printable poster, a series of concept cars, architectural plans or videos, we will create whatever it takes to achieve quality media features. Only when you're crazy excited about an idea will we move forward to content creation.

Only when you're crazy excited about an idea will we move forward to content creation.

“The team at NeoMam know how to make every campaign effective —an ability few other agencies can lay claim to. Since day one, NeoMam have understood our highly specific needs and have produced and outreached stunning visual assets that always yield real, measurable results.”

Joe Jamieson Content Manager Work the World

PRODUCTION Stage

After you've selected an idea, our team will develop strong, clear and easy-to-digest copy with a compelling narrative.

Once the copy is ready, it's time to create the visuals.

Did you know that it takes us 1/10 of a second to understand visuals versus 60 seconds to read 250 words?

Visuals increase readability and attract journalists. Every image we produce is developed under Creative Commons 4.0 International License, which requires appropriate credit with a link.

What does this mean for you? Wider coverage, a larger audience and greater reader comprehension.

WHAT YOU GET
  • 3 content ideas with explanations about why they're relevant and how they will work for you.

“They certainly do have their ear to the ground with regards to knowing what the media and internet wants. This insight has helped produce fantastic infographics that have captured the attention of many large publications, bloggers and social media influencers. I would highly recommend them as a content marketing solution for any company’s marketing needs.”

Tony Tie Senior SEO Expedia

Testing stage

Before we hit up journalists we test your content with a real audience of at least 1,000 people using Reddit.

We make adjustments based on audience feedback, so we're confident about the success of your content even before we start pitching.

Read more about our testing process here.

Promotion Stage

The key to a successful campaign lies in only reaching out to the right people.

We only pitch to journalists, editors and bloggers who'll be interested in your content. We also draw on our relationships with major publishers who have shared similar content for us in the past.

The result? Your content gets picked up by a range of sites, from media heavyweights to niche blogs.

WHAT You get:
  • An outreach strategy overview document – see example
  • Real-time updates via email as big placements go live
  • A final report provided by CoverageBook, which includes PDF and Excel files detailing every piece of coverage you received - see example

"It's been amazing working with NeoMam on our content marketing projects. They have an outstanding ability to not only create interesting and engaging content, but then to follow it up with successful promotional campaigns."

Sean Myers Senior Digital Marketing Enova International

ABOUT OUR GUARANTEE

Guaranteed results are based upon the
average over 3 campaigns so some
projects may perform better than others.

  • From sites with a MOZ DA 40+

  • Not submission sites

  • Not paid for

Every project has a total number of links we guarantee across the entire campaign.

Nevertheless, if you don't receive the guaranteed number of features within 3
campaigns, we will continue to produce and promote content until that target is
met.
